event_notes: Source venue label preserved during 2026-03-18 Wave 2 venue canonicalization: Goat, Fishtrap Lake.
event_comments:
Three controls were placed with the wrong SI box and code.
This had the greatest impact on the Kid, which had all three of these controls.
One of these controls (#2 on the Kid and #26 on the Goat, labeled 178 in situ) on the north side of a thicket was in long grass and was extremely difficult to see.
Results were allowed to stand as is; nobody was penalized for not punching these controls and none counted as skips.
RouteGadget for the event does not include the Kid; a separate Kid RG link is provided.
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
Result status codes: MSP = missing punch; DNF = did not finish; NC = not competing; DQ = disqualified; OVT = overtime; DNS = did not start.
